title: Computer Use Runtime — Canon Compliance Matrix

elements.name: IBrowserRuntime protocol
elements.notes: 4 methods: launch_session, navigate_to, execute_script, capture_dom_state. LAW 2: conforms to Interface Authority. LAW 10: isolation_context param. LAW 14: dom_hash integrity. RULE 2: sandbox_token gating.

elements.name: IDesktopWorker protocol
elements.notes: 4 methods: click, type_text, screenshot_region, get_foreground_window. LAW 10: sandboxed interaction. RULE 2: target must have valid_selector or spatial_bbox_verified. RULE 1: deterministic screenshot hash.

elements.name: IVisionGrounding protocol
elements.notes: 4 methods: detect_ui_element, extract_text_ocr, compute_spatial_bbox, match_template. RULE 1: deterministic detection (same image + query → same bbox). RULE 3: low-confidence thresholding.

elements.name: ISessionJournal protocol
elements.notes: 4 methods: record_action, save_checkpoint, replay_to_state, rollback_transaction. LAW 24: all actions dispatched through journal. RULE 1: deterministic state hash chain. RULE 3: rollback guarded.

elements.name: ComputerSession dataclass
elements.notes: session_trace_id (LAW 12), isolation_context (LAW 10), state_hash (RULE 1), resource_limits, worker_pid, sandbox_token.

elements.name: ActionPayload dataclass
elements.notes: action_type, target_selector, coordinates, sandbox_token, guard_status. RULE 2: sandbox_token gates execution. RULE 3: guard_status tracks interaction guard result.

elements.name: VisualGroundingReport dataclass
elements.notes: grounding_hash (RULE 1 deterministic), confidence_score thresholding (RULE 3), is_safe flag.

elements.name: JournalEntry dataclass
elements.notes: previous_entry_hash for chain integrity (RULE 1), state_hash cumulative, sequence_number monotonic.

elements.name: SandboxProfile dataclass
elements.notes: LAW 10: network_policy, filesystem_policy, capability_guard, resource_quota, isolation_token. RULE 2: capability_guard boolean matrix.

elements.name: SessionReplayManifest dataclass
elements.notes: determinism_threshold, expected_state_chain, deviation_found. RULE 1: deterministic replay verification.

elements.name: CapabilityViolationReport dataclass
elements.notes: RULE 2: sandbox_token comparison. RULE 3: severity escalation path.

elements.name: WorkerType enum
elements.notes: BROWSER, DESKTOP, VISION.

elements.name: SessionState enum
elements.notes: INIT, READY, INTERACTING, PAUSED, CHECKPOINTED, TERMINATED. LAW 10: isolation lifecycle. RULE 4: state-based isolation.

elements.name: ActionType enum
elements.notes: 10 action types dispatched through LAW 24 Dispatcher.

elements.name: InteractionGuardStatus enum
elements.notes: PASSED, BLOCKED_SELECTOR, BLOCKED_SPATIAL, BLOCKED_CAPABILITY, BLOCKED_SANDBOX. RULE 2: IO gating. RULE 3: safety enforcement.

elements.name: CapabilityFlag enum
elements.notes: 10 capability flags for sandbox guard matrix. LAW 10: isolation profile. RULE 2: declared capabilities.

elements.name: Session State Machine — 6 states
elements.notes: INIT → READY → INTERACTING → PAUSED/CHECKPOINTED → TERMINATED. LAW 10: isolated lifecycle. RULE 4: state-based isolation context.

elements.name: 12 State Transitions (G1–G12)
elements.notes: All 12 transitions defined with guard functions. G1–G12 cover all reachable paths. Each maps to LAW/RULE.

elements.name: Guard I1 — Selector Validity
elements.notes: Prevents actions targeting non-existent/ambiguous elements. Checks: non-empty selector, ≤1 DOM match, element visible.

elements.name: Guard I2 — Spatial Bounding Box
elements.notes: Prevents clicks/types outside safe region. Checks: within viewport, not covered by overlay, target focusable.

elements.name: Guard I3 — Capability Match
elements.notes: Prevents undeclared capability usage. Checks: session.capabilities contains action capability, sandbox_token matches.

elements.name: Guard I4 — Session Isolation
elements.notes: Prevents cross-session contamination. Checks: session state READY/INTERACTING, ID match, worker alive.

elements.name: Guard I5 — Visual Grounding Consistency
elements.notes: Prevents stale visual grounding. Checks: visual_context_hash matches, detect confidence ≥0.7, template match ≥threshold.

elements.name: Guard I6 — Journal Integrity
elements.notes: Prevents journal tampering. Checks: previous_entry_hash chain, monotonic sequence, replay deviation < threshold.

elements.name: Guard I7 — Resource Quota
elements.notes: Prevents resource exhaustion. Checks: cpu_sec, memory_mb, action_count, session_duration against limits.

elements.name: Guard I8 — Deterministic Replay
elements.notes: Ensures deterministic replay. Checks: action_stream matches journal, state_hash sequence matches, determinism confidence ≥0.95.

elements.name: Deterministic Replay Guard Formula
elements.notes: state_hash_n = H(state_hash_{n-1} || action_payload_n || pre_action_visual_hash_n). SHA-256, deterministic.

elements.name: Deviation Tolerance Table
elements.notes: 6 metrics with thresholds. State hash deviation strict 0%. Visual diff ≤5% viewport. Determinsm confidence ≥0.95.

elements.name: G5 Swarm → H1 BrowserRuntime flow
elements.notes: G5.SwarmCoordinator.broadcast_task → H1.BrowserRuntime.launch_session. §2 Flow 1. mission_trace_id propagated.

elements.name: G5 Swarm → H1 DesktopWorker flow
elements.notes: G5.SwarmCoordinator.broadcast_task → H1.DesktopWorker.click. §2 Flow 2. Guards I1+I2+I3 enforced.

elements.name: G5 Swarm → H1 VisionGrounding flow
elements.notes: G5.SwarmCoordinator.broadcast_task → H1.VisionGrounding.detect_ui_element. §2 Flow 3. Guard I5 enforced.

elements.name: Phase 4 Sandbox integration
elements.notes: All H1 flows execute inside Phase4.Sandbox. SandboxProfile model: network_policy, filesystem_policy, capability_guard, isolation_token.

elements.name: F4 Observability hooks
elements.notes: 4 event hooks: SessionDrift, ActionTimeout, VisualGroundingFailure, CapabilityViolation. Each reports to F4 TraceCollector + AlertRouter.

elements.name: Correlation ID propagation
elements.notes: mission_trace_id (G5) → session_trace_id (H1) → action_sequence_number → journal_entry_id. §3 Propagation Matrix.

elements.name: Latency budgets
elements.notes: 9 operation budgets defined (navigate 30s, script 10s, click 5s, etc.). Action on exceed: timeout/retry/fail.

elements.name: Idempotency guarantees
elements.notes: 6 operations classified. navigate_to/click/screenshot/detect/extract/template_match are idempotent (RULE 1). type_text/execute_script are not.

elements.name: Rollback on failure
elements.notes: 7 failure modes with rollback actions: navigation timeout → checkpoint restore, click miss → retry, grounding miss → OCR fallback, etc.

elements.name: ISessionJournal recording
elements.notes: Every action in all 3 flows is recorded via ISessionJournal.record_action(). LAW 24: all actions dispatched. RULE 1: deterministic hashing.

elements.name: §15.15b Phase H scope alignment
elements.notes: 4 protocols match §15.15b Phase H scope: Browser, Desktop, Vision, Journal. All signatures align with ROADMAP Phase H.

elements.name: Zero modifications to core/
elements.notes: All 5 deliverables are design-only: protocols/, models/, .md, .json. No changes to core/ or tests/.

elements.name: No executable runtime code
elements.notes: Protocols use typing.Protocol (not ABC). No Playwright/PyAutoGUI/OpenCV calls. Focus on Worker Lifecycle Policy, Session Isolation Rules, Action Recording Contract.

elements.name: All deliverables in required paths
elements.notes: protocols/01_computer_use_protocols.py, models/02_session_and_action_models.py, 03_session_state_machine.md, 04_integration_blueprint.md, 05_canon_compliance_matrix.json

elements.name: Session model carries session_trace_id
elements.notes: STOP CONDITION PASSED: ComputerSession.session_trace_id is present. Violation would break LAW 12 Traceability.

elements.name: Session model carries isolation_context
elements.notes: STOP CONDITION PASSED: ComputerSession.isolation_context is present with sandbox_id, network_policy, filesystem_policy, capability_guard_token.

elements.name: Interaction Guards prevent uncontrolled IO
elements.notes: STOP CONDITION PASSED: Guards I1 (selector), I2 (spatial), I3 (capability) all require valid_selector AND spatial_bbox_verified AND capability_match before action dispatch.

elements.name: Integration Blueprint respects Phase 4 Sandbox boundaries
elements.notes: STOP CONDITION PASSED: All 3 flows explicitly route through Phase4.Sandbox. Dispatcher Ownership (LAW 24) respected. SandboxProfile model defines boundaries.
